sqlMap.select: select DesignationId,DesignationDescription from AttorneyDesignationLW order by DesignationDescription
select AttorneyKey,AttorneyName from AttorneyDetailsLW where policykey=#PolicyKey# and VersionSequence=(select max(VersionSequence) from firmlw where PolicyKey=#PolicyKey#) and isAttorneyEndorsed='N'
sqlMap.insert: insert into AttorneyDesignationLW(DesignationId DesignationDescription LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#DesignationId:NUMERIC# #DesignationDescription# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select DesignationId, DesignationDescription, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from AttorneyDesignationLW where DesignationId = #DesignationId#
sqlMap.update:
update AttorneyDesignationLW set
DesignationDescription = #DesignationDescription# DesignationDescription = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where DesignationId = #DesignationId#
sqlMap.select: select DesignationId, DesignationDescription, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from AttorneyDesignationLW where DesignationId = #DesignationId#
select DesignationId, DesignationDescription, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from AttorneyDesignationLW
